externalServices.payments: TEST REMOTE CONFIG — Stripe account needed.
externalServices.sms: Sending texts requires Twilio, which needs its own account. Free to start.
externalServices.email: Lovable doesn't send emails on its own. You'll need a free Resend account for that.

externalServices.maps: Showing a live map requires Google Maps, which needs its own API key. Free to start.
externalServices.voice: That will need ElevenLabs — it's a separate account but straightforward to connect.
externalServices.imageGeneration: Generating images will need an external service like Replicate — separate account required.

externalServices.payments: Bolt can wire up Stripe for that, but you'll need your own free Stripe account before you start building.
externalServices.sms: Sending texts requires Twilio, which needs its own account. Free to start.
externalServices.email: Bolt doesn't send emails natively. You'll need a free Resend account for that.

externalServices.payments: Replit can wire up Stripe for that, but you'll need your own free Stripe account before you start building.
externalServices.sms: Sending texts requires Twilio, which needs its own account. Free to start.
externalServices.email: Replit doesn't send emails natively. You'll need a free SendGrid account for that.

externalServices.database: v0 handles the frontend but you'll need Supabase for storing data. Free to start.
externalServices.auth: User accounts need Supabase Auth, which is a free separate account.
externalServices.payments: You'll need your own Stripe account for payments. Free to set up.
externalServices.email: You'll need a free Resend account for emails since v0 doesn't handle that.
externalServices.sms: Sending texts requires Twilio, which needs its own account. Free to start.

externalServices.database: You'll need Supabase for the database. Free account, straightforward to connect.
